subcodes.first_line: O friends! The stream of the All-Merciful's grace is flowing, and the Sea of Life is manifest and visible through the blessedness of the Most Great Name in all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان فرات رحمت رحمن جاری و بحر حیوان ظاهر و مشهود بمبارکی اسم اعظم در کل
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Greatest Name
